my_thoughts: My intent says 'Shift their frame...' but the student is in seeking_internal_moral_compass. Am I trying to shift their frame or are they already shifting? The comparison_contrast mechanism suggests I'm doing something, but maybe they're doing it to themselves and I'm just naming it.
accumulated_insight: T3 (Final): Student 'Then how am I to judge my desires?'—now seeking internal moral compass. Episode complete after 3 turns, moving from stuck on moral relativism to seeking internal moral compass. Teaching arc used comparison contrast in SELF-MAKING phase to address methodological inquiry, instruction seeking. Student progressed through 3-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
See whether they bind you or free you.
What turns you to yourself is right; what turns you away from yourself is wrong.
